themeWords.meaning: The covenant name of God; the LORD
To wait for, hope in, expect

sentenceTheme: A brief psalm of humble contentment that calls Israel to place enduring hope in the LORD.

verses.text: LORD, my heart is not haughty, nor mine eyes lofty: neither do I exercise myself in great matters, or in things too high for me.

highlightedWords.meaning: The covenant name of God; the LORD

verses.text: Surely I have behaved and quieted myself, as a child that is weaned of his mother: my soul is even as a weaned child.

highlightedWords.meaning: To wean; to deal fully with

verses.text: Let Israel hope in the LORD from henceforth and for ever.

highlightedWords.meaning: To wait for, hope in, expect
